methods.description: This method applies the REVEALS model to reconstruct landscape openness from pollen counts, addressing the underestimation of herb presence in pollen percentage values.

steps.description: Use the Lagrangian stochastic model for pollen dispersal and apply pollen productivity estimates derived for the SW-Baltic study area.

steps.description: Set the lake diameter in the model at 600 m.

steps.description: Apply the model with the REVEALSinR function from the DISQOVER package in R version 3.6.3.

methods.description: Preprocessing of geochemical data for further statistical analysis, including transformations and standardizations.
